title: Straw Cleaner Brush Extra Long 12 inch, Extra Wide 12mm diam for Pipe Cleaners for Weed, Straw Cleaning Brush for Tubes, Downstem and Bowl, Water Bottle, Sippy Cup, Extra Long Straw Brush Set 10 Pack
features: 【SIZE & QUANTITY】 include 10 pcs of 12 inch length x 12mm diameter Extra Long Straw Brush, Packed in one nice CIDYAUST bag
【QUALITY】 These Extra Long Straw Cleaner Brushes Made of top 18-8 food grade 304HC stainless steel wire, Soft and Durable nylon bristles.BPA FREE

【PURPOSE】 The handle of stainless steel is very strong durable, And the end tip coating that can protective your glass straws or soft silicone pipes, You can use these Straw Brushes not only easily to clean inside surface on stainless, silicone, glass and tapered spouts, But also you can use these pipe cleaners to clean hard to reach corners, holes.
【USAGE METHOD】 These Straw Cleaners are very easy to use. And it can reuseable, it will be better to use with a bit dish soap and warm water to do your clean work.
【SERVICE】 CIDYAUST Brand Straw Brushes. If you not completely satisfied with your purchase, pls feel free to contact me at any time. We will resolve your any question or problem into 12 hours。
description: Product Description The life force of brand CIDYAUST is from the natural, functions and high quality Simple Generous and steady lines for the modern living design with attaches great importance to quality are the foundation of CIDYAUST. Good Elasticity The handle of stainless steel wire is very bendable and durable. Food Grade Material These straw cleaner brushes are made of 304 stainless steel wire wound, BPA free, flexible, NO rust , easily deformed ,The brush bristles is made of high-quality nylon. Durable but soft nylon bristles in a spiral,makes the brush bristle not easy to fall off and have a long service life. Food Grade 304 Stainless Steel The sturdy handle with hook makes you feel very good to hold, and easier to clean. The hook is used for hanging for the drying and storage. End protective Design End tip coating of the brush that can protective glass straws or soft tubes that does not scratch the inside, Widely used & multifunctional brush It is widely used in your daily life these straw cleaner brush not just used for cleaning the various length straws , also can be used to clean Pipe, Narrow Tube, Coffee Pot,Sink Drain, Hummingbird Feeder, and other hard to access corners.and also convenient for cleaning sippy cup spouts, funnel necks, tube or cylinder and with various drinkware like Hydro Flask, Contigo, Yeti, and others. Enjoy not only the delicious orange juice, but also the taste of a happy life. Our products great for clean your straws , Sippy Cups, Water bottles, Tervis, Yeti, Starbucks Cup and other stubborn stains in those small spaces. Just insert them into the pipe, rotate, remove and clean them. The long and soft but durable bristle can effectively remove scale and stains without scratching the inside of the straw..
